categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-28318: SolarWinds Serv-U actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST requests using the Content-Encoding: deflate header to crash the Serv-U service without authentication.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-45247: Mirasvit Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the…

briefings.title: CVE-2022-0492: Linux Kernel actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.

briefings.title: CVE-2025-71316 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: SQLite 'sqldiff.exe' does not securely handle the way the Microsoft Windows C runtime converts Unicode characters to ANSI codepages. An attacker could use the '-L' option to load an arbitrary DLL with a crafted command line argument…

briefings.title: CVE-2024-27890 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.6)
briefings.excerpt: Affected platforms running Arista EOS with OpenConfig configured, a gNMI Set request can be run when it should have been rejected. This can result in unexpected configuration being applied to the switch.

briefings.title: CVE-2024-27892 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.6)
briefings.excerpt: Affected platforms running Arista EOS with OpenConfig configured, a gNMI Set request can be run when it should have been rejected. This can result in unexpected configuration being applied to the switch.
